nav.areYouArtistApplyHere: Are you an Artist? Apply here

footer.tagline: Your gateway to premium live concert streaming experiences.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.intro: DREEMYSTAR is your gateway to premium live concert streaming experiences. We connect fans with artists across music and comedy, offering live events, replays, and bundles worldwide.
aboutUs.mission: Our mission is to bring live performances to audiences everywhere with secure payments, high-quality streaming, and support for artists and creators.
aboutUs.contactPrompt: For any questions or feedback, please contact us at contact@dreemystar.com or see the Contact section in the footer.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Dreemystar's website, applications, and services (the "Platform"). By using the Platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
termsOfService.s1Body: You must be at least 18 years old, or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, to create an account or purchase tickets on Dreemystar. By using the Platform, you represent that you meet these requirements and that the information you provide is accurate and complete.
termsOfService.s2Body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use or security breach. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or pose a risk to the Platform or other users.
termsOfService.s3Li1: Use the Platform for any unlawful, harmful, or fraudulent purpose.
termsOfService.s3Li2: Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the Platform, including attempting to bypass technical protections.
termsOfService.s3Li3: Record, redistribute, or publicly broadcast streams or content from the Platform without explicit permission from the rights holders.
termsOfService.s3Li4: Impersonate another person or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity.
termsOfService.s4Body: When you purchase tickets or send tips, you agree to the pricing and conditions presented at checkout. Unless otherwise stated, ticket purchases and tips are generally non‑refundable. Payment processing is handled by third‑party providers, and your use of those services may be subject to their terms and policies.
termsOfService.s5Body: All content on the Platform, including streams, recordings, images, logos, and branding, is owned by Dreemystar or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You receive a limited, non‑transferable, non‑exclusive license to view content for personal, non‑commercial use. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written consent.
termsOfService.s6Body: Artists and partners who use Dreemystar to host events are independent from Dreemystar. While we strive to maintain a high standard of quality, we do not guarantee the performance, availability, or content of any specific event or artist. Any issues related to an event should be reported to us so we can assist where possible.
termsOfService.s7Body: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Platform at any time, with or without notice, if we reasonably believe that you have violated these Terms, engaged in fraudulent or abusive behavior, or if required by law or a regulatory authority.
termsOfService.s8Body: The Platform is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Dreemystar is not liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Platform, tickets, or content, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.
termsOfService.s9Body: We may update these Terms from time to time. When we do, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the Platform after changes take effect constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms.
termsOfService.s10Body: If you have any questions about these Terms or the Platform, please contact us at

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Dreemystar ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our website, applications, and services (the "Platform").
privacyPolicy.s1Intro: We may collect the following types of information:
privacyPolicy.s1AccountBody: such as your name, username, email address, phone number, country, and profile details when you register or update your account.
privacyPolicy.s1UsageBody: including pages visited, events watched, tickets purchased, tips sent, survey responses, and interactions with artists or content on the Platform.
privacyPolicy.s1PaymentBody: we use trusted payment providers to process transactions. We do not store full card details on our servers, but we may receive information such as transaction IDs, amounts, and status.
privacyPolicy.s1DeviceBody: including IP address, browser type, device type, language, and basic diagnostic data to secure and improve the Platform.
privacyPolicy.s2Li1: Provide and maintain the Platform, including streaming events and managing tickets.
privacyPolicy.s2Li2: Process payments, tips, and refunds where applicable.
privacyPolicy.s2Li3: Communicate with you about your account, support requests, security updates, and important notices.
privacyPolicy.s2Li4: Personalize your experience, such as recommending artists, events, or content you may like.
privacyPolicy.s2Li5: Monitor usage, prevent abuse or fraud, and improve the stability and performance of the Platform.
privacyPolicy.s2Li6: Comply with legal obligations and enforce our Terms of Service.
privacyPolicy.s3Intro: We may share your information with:
privacyPolicy.s3ProvidersBody: such as payment processors, email/SMS providers, analytics tools, and infrastructure partners who help us operate the Platform.
privacyPolicy.s3ArtistsBody: in aggregated or limited form, for example to show them audience statistics or survey insights. We do not share your full payment details with artists.
privacyPolicy.s3LegalBody: when required by law, regulation, or to respond to valid legal requests, or to protect our rights, users, and the Platform.
privacyPolicy.s4Body: We keep your information only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law (for example, accounting or regulatory obligations).
privacyPolicy.s5Intro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacyPolicy.s5Li1: Access, correct, or update your account information.
privacyPolicy.s5Li2: Request deletion of your account and associated personal data, subject to legal requirements.
privacyPolicy.s5Li3: Opt out of certain marketing communications (you can also use the unsubscribe links in emails).
privacyPolicy.s5Li4: Manage cookies and tracking preferences via your browser or device settings, as explained in our Cookie Policy.
privacyPolicy.s6Body: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or alteration. However, no online service can be 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacyPolicy.s7Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the Platform after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPolicy.s8Body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Dreemystar ("we", "us", or "our") uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website, use our applications, or interact with our services (collectively, the "Platform").
cookiePolicy.s1Body: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the website recognize your device and remember information about your visit, such as your preferred language, login state, and other settings.
cookiePolicy.s2Intro: We use cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:
cookiePolicy.s2EssentialBody: Required for the Platform to function, including authentication, security, and core navigation. Without these cookies, services you have requested (such as logging in or buying tickets) cannot be provided.
cookiePolicy.s2PerformanceBody: To understand how visitors use the Platform, improve performance, and troubleshoot issues. We may use first-party analytics or trusted third‑party tools for this purpose.
cookiePolicy.s2PreferencesBody: To remember your language, region, and other settings so that your experience is consistent and personalized.
cookiePolicy.s2MarketingBody: To understand what content and artists users are interested in so we can improve recommendations, campaigns, and future programming.
cookiePolicy.s3Body: Some cookies may be placed by third‑party services that we integrate with the Platform (for example, payment providers, analytics tools, or embedded media). These providers may collect information about your activity across websites or services, in accordance with their own privacy and cookie policies.
cookiePolicy.s4Body: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can choose to block or delete cookies, or to receive a warning before a cookie is stored on your device. Please note that if you disable essential cookies, some features of the Platform may not work correctly or may be unavailable.
cookiePolicy.s4Body2: For more detailed information on how to manage cookies, please refer to your browser's help documentation.
cookiePolicy.s5Body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, law, or our services. When we do, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this page periodically to stay informed about how we use cookies.
cookiePolicy.s6Body: If you have any questions about this Cookie Policy or our use of cookies and similar technologies, you can contact us at

help.topic_fans_browse_content: From the Home page you can see featured and upcoming concerts. Use Live Events to watch streams happening now, or Upcoming Concerts to discover future events. Use the Search page to find artists, events, genres, or countries.
help.topic_fans_account_content: Click Sign Up in the navigation. Choose to register as a Fan or an Artist. For fans, enter your username, full name, email or phone, and password. You can also sign up with email or phone. Once registered, you can buy tickets, watch events, and request callbacks from this Help page.
help.topic_fans_buyTickets_content: On any event page (Home, Upcoming Concerts, or an artist page) you can add an event to your cart or pay with card / mobile money directly. You do not need an account to buy a ticket: you can enter your email or phone at checkout. After payment you receive a confirmation email with a link to watch the event.
help.topic_fans_cart_content: Your cart shows all events you have added. You can remove items or proceed to checkout. At checkout, enter your email or phone (required for guest users) so we can send your ticket and updates. Payment options include Card (Stripe) and mobile money (where available). Service fee and VAT are applied at checkout.
help.topic_fans_bundles_content: From the Bundles page you can buy 3- or 5-ticket bundles at a discount. Credits are used one per live event. You must be signed in to purchase a bundle. Bundle credits appear when you go to pay for a single event if you have an active bundle.
help.topic_fans_watchLive_content: When an event is live, open the event and click Watch. If you have a valid ticket (or bought with that email/phone), you will see the stream. You can pause, mute, fullscreen, and use the like button. If you do not have a ticket, you will see the option to get one or add to cart.
help.topic_fans_replays_content: After an event ends, a replay may be available. From the event page you can buy replay access (one-time) if it is offered. Some live tickets include a short replay window. The Replays page lists past events you can search and purchase.
help.topic_fans_callback_content: Use the form on this Help page to request a callback. Enter your phone number, email, and a description of your request (at least 50 characters). Our team typically responds within 24 hours. You will receive a confirmation email in your chosen language.
help.topic_artists_apply_content: From the navigation or Home, go to the Artist Application page. Fill in your details, social links, follower counts, and upload required screenshots. Applications are reviewed by the team. If approved, you receive an invitation email to complete registration. Do not falsify information; falsified data can result in a permanent ban.
help.topic_artists_register_content: If you received a contract invite, open the artist registration link and enter the contract number and temporary password from your email. After validation you will see the create-account form pre-set as Artist. Complete your profile (genre, country, region, etc.) and submit to join the platform.
help.topic_artists_dashboard_content: After signing in as an artist, the Dashboard gives you an overview: total events, viewers, tickets sold, and active events. Use the sidebar to access Schedule (create events), Go Live / Creator Studio, My Recordings, Followers, and analytics. Revenue and payment information are available in the dashboard when enabled.
help.topic_artists_schedule_content: Go to Schedule and create a new event. Set the title, description, start time, duration, and price. You can choose a registered artist profile or add an unregistered artist name. Once saved, the event appears in Upcoming Concerts. You can edit or cancel before it starts.
help.topic_artists_goLive_content: When it is time to stream, open the event and use Go Live / Creator Studio. Connect your camera and microphone; you can start the stream when ready. Viewers with tickets will see the live feed. Chat and other features may be available depending on platform settings. You can end the stream when the event is over.
help.topic_artists_recordings_content: If recording is enabled, your live stream may be recorded automatically. From My Recordings you can see and manage past recordings. Replays can be offered for sale or as part of the ticket; visibility is controlled in dashboard settings.
help.topic_artists_revenue_content: Ticket sales and replay purchases generate revenue. The platform share and artist share are set by admins (e.g. 30% / 70%). Your dashboard shows tickets sold and revenue. Payout and payment details are available in the payment section when the feature is enabled.
help.topic_artists_followers_content: Fans can follow you from your profile or event pages. The Followers section in your dashboard shows your follower count and list. Notifications can be sent to followers when you schedule or start an event, if enabled in app config.
help.topic_admins_dashboard_content: As a global or super admin you see platform-wide stats: total users, artists, events, revenue, and tickets. Use the sidebar to access Analytics, User Management, Artist Management, Monitoring (callback requests), and app configuration.
help.topic_admins_applications_content: Under Artist Management or Applications you can review pending artist applications. Approve (qualify) or reject each application. Approved artists receive an invitation email to register. You can resend the invite from the same screen. Applications show social links and screenshots for verification.
help.topic_admins_contracts_content: Contract invites let you create registration links for artists with a contract number and temporary password. Generate a link and share it with the artist; they use the Artist Registration page to validate and create their account. You can manage active invites from the Contract Invites section.
help.topic_admins_config_content: In Features or configuration you can enable or disable: artist login, live chat, recording, gift button, bundles, replays, notifications (email/SMS for admins, artists, fans), visitor counter, advertisements, and more. Default event price and duration can be set. Changes apply platform-wide.
help.topic_admins_users_content: The Users section lists registered users. You can view profiles and user types (fan, artist, admin). New users register through the public sign-up or artist application flow; you cannot create accounts directly here but you can manage roles and platform access.
help.topic_admins_helpMgmt_content: Admins can manage help articles in the Help Management section. You can add, edit, or delete articles and assign them to sections. Help content can be used in addition to or instead of the built-in translated topics (For Fans, For Artists, For Admins) depending on your setup.
help.db_general_welcome_content: Use the sections below to find answers. You can also request a callback from the form on this page.
help.db_general_0_content: Use the sections below to find answers. You can also request a callback from the form on this page.
help.db_general_1_content: Browse the sections on this page or use the search. For personal assistance, use the callback form on this page.
help.db_general_2_content: Request a callback using the form on this page. Enter your email, phone, and a short description (at least 50 characters). We will get back to you. You can also email contact@dreemystar.com.
help.db_gettingStarted_first_steps_content: Create an account (Sign Up), browse events on the Home or Upcoming Concerts page, and buy tickets with Card or Mobile Money. After payment you receive a confirmation email with a link to watch.
help.db_gettingStarted_0_content: Create an account (Sign Up), browse events on the Home or Upcoming Concerts page, and buy tickets with Card or Mobile Money. After payment you receive a confirmation email with a link to watch.
help.db_gettingStarted_1_content: Sign up, browse events, and buy tickets. Use the Help sections above for more detail or request a callback.
help.db_gettingStarted_2_content: Explore Home and Upcoming Concerts, then add events to your cart. Payment is by Card or Mobile Money. Need help? Use the callback form on this page.
help.db_tickets_how_to_buy_content: On any event page, click Add to cart or Pay. At checkout enter your email or phone. You can pay by Card (Stripe) or mobile money (where available). After payment you get a confirmation email with your ticket link.
help.db_tickets_0_content: On any event page, click Add to cart or Pay. At checkout enter your email or phone. You can pay by Card (Stripe) or mobile money (where available). After payment you get a confirmation email with your ticket link.
help.db_tickets_1_content: After payment you receive a confirmation email with your ticket link. Use that link to watch when the event is live. Keep the email for your records.
help.db_tickets_2_content: One ticket gives access per event. You can buy multiple events in one cart. For issues with a ticket, use the callback form on this page or email contact@dreemystar.com.
help.db_payment_0_content: We accept Card (Stripe) and mobile money (where available). Prices may include a service fee and VAT. Payments are processed securely.
help.db_payment_1_content: At checkout you can pay by card or mobile money. If payment fails, try another method, use the callback form on this page, or email contact@dreemystar.com.
help.db_payments_methods_content: We accept Card (Visa, Mastercard, etc.) via Stripe and mobile money where enabled. Prices may include a service fee and VAT. All payments are processed securely by our providers.
help.db_payments_0_content: We accept Card (Visa, Mastercard, etc.) via Stripe and mobile money where enabled. Prices may include a service fee and VAT. All payments are processed securely by our providers.
help.db_payments_1_content: Pay with your card at checkout (Stripe) or use mobile money where enabled. All transactions are secure.
help.db_payments_2_content: If payment fails, try another card or method, use the callback form on this page, or email contact@dreemystar.com.
help.db_technical_requirements_content: Use a modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and a stable internet connection. For best quality, use Wi‑Fi or 4G. You can watch on desktop, tablet, or phone.
help.db_technical_0_content: Use a modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and a stable internet connection. For best quality, use Wi‑Fi or 4G. You can watch on desktop, tablet, or phone.
help.db_technical_1_content: We recommend Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge with a stable connection. Clear cache or try another browser if you have issues.
help.db_technical_2_content: Use Wi‑Fi or 4G for best quality. Close other tabs or apps if the stream buffers. For more help, use the callback form on this page or email contact@dreemystar.com.
help.db_policies_terms_content: Our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Cookie Policy are linked in the footer. By using the platform you agree to these policies.
help.db_policies_0_content: Our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Cookie Policy are linked in the footer. By using the platform you agree to these policies.
help.db_policies_1_content: By using the platform you agree to our Terms of Service. Read the full terms in the footer.
help.db_policies_2_content: Our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy explain how we use your data. They are linked in the footer.
help.db_streaming_how_to_watch_content: When an event is live, open the event page and click Watch. If you have a valid ticket (or bought with your email/phone), the stream will play. You can pause, mute, and use fullscreen.
help.db_streaming_0_content: When an event is live, open the event page and click Watch. If you have a valid ticket (or bought with your email/phone), the stream will play. You can pause, mute, and use fullscreen.
help.db_streaming_1_content: Open the event when it is live and click Watch. You need a valid ticket or the email/phone used at purchase. Use fullscreen or adjust volume as needed.
help.db_streaming_2_content: Refresh the page, check your connection, and ensure you are logged in or using the same email/phone as at checkout. For more help, use the callback form on this page or email contact@dreemystar.com.
help.db_account_manage_content: Sign in and go to Profile to update your name, email, phone, and preferences. You can also view your tickets and favorites from the navigation.
help.db_account_0_content: Sign in and go to Profile to update your name, email, phone, and preferences. You can also view your tickets and favorites from the navigation.
help.db_account_1_content: Sign in and go to Profile to update your name, email, phone, and preferences. You can also view your tickets and favorites from the navigation.
help.db_account_2_content: Use Sign In in the navigation to access your account. Keep your password private and sign out on shared devices. If you forget your password, use the reset option on the sign-in page. For security, we recommend a strong password and not sharing your login details.
help.db_account_3_content: In Profile you can update your display name, email, phone number, and country. You can also manage your favorites and view your ticket history. Changes are saved automatically. To change your account type or close your account, email contact@dreemystar.com or use the callback form on the Help page.
help.db_troubleshooting_common_issues_content: If the stream does not load, check your internet and try refreshing. If payment fails, try another method or email contact@dreemystar.com. For other issues, use the callback form on this page.
help.db_troubleshooting_0_content: If the stream does not load, check your internet and try refreshing. If payment fails, try another method or email contact@dreemystar.com. For other issues, use the callback form on this page.
help.db_troubleshooting_1_content: If the stream does not load, check your internet and try refreshing. If payment fails, try another method or email contact@dreemystar.com. For other issues, use the callback form on this page.
help.db_cant_start_stream_content: Make sure you are on the correct event page and that the event is in "live" or "streaming" mode. Check that your browser has allowed camera and microphone permissions. Try refreshing the page and starting again. If you are the artist, ensure you are signed in with the account that owns the event. For persistent issues, use the callback form on this page or email contact@dreemystar.com.
help.db_chat_not_working_content:
If chat isn't working:

Check These:
1. Make sure you're logged in
2. Refresh the page
3. Check your internet connection
4. Make sure the stream is live

Common Issues:
- Chat may be disabled by the artist
- You may need to purchase a ticket to chat
- Browser may be blocking WebSocket connections
- Ad blockers may interfere

Solutions:
- Disable ad blockers
- Allow WebSocket connections in browser settings
- Try a different browser
- Clear browser cache

Still Not Working:
- Check browser console for errors
- Try incognito mode
- Email contact@dreemystar.com or use the callback form on the Help page

artistApplication.introDescription: Fill in the form below to apply. We review every application carefully, and eligible artists are invited to join based on the quality of their work and overall presence.
artistApplication.title: Join Dreemystar as an Artist
artistApplication.thankYouReview: Thank you for your interest in joining Dreemystar. Your application is being reviewed.
artistApplication.emailOutcome: You will receive an email at {{email}} with the outcome of your application. Please check your inbox (and spam folder).
artistApplication.socialIntro: Provide your social media links, exact follower counts, and a screenshot of your profile showing the follower count.
artistApplication.warningTitle: WARNING: Zero tolerance for falsified information
artistApplication.warningBody: All screenshots and information provided will be verified by the Dreemystar team. Any falsified, manipulated, or doctored evidence will result in a permanent ban from the platform, with no possibility of future applications or appeal.
artistApplication.screenshotYoutube: Screenshot of your YouTube profile showing subscribers
artistApplication.screenshotInstagram: Screenshot of your Instagram profile showing followers
artistApplication.screenshotTiktok: Screenshot of your TikTok profile showing followers
artistApplication.screenshotFacebook: Screenshot of your Facebook page showing followers
artistApplication.hasHeldOnlineEvent: Have you held an event online before?
artistApplication.linkToVideo: Link to the video of your online event
artistApplication.describeOffer: Describe briefly what you would like to offer on Dreemystar
artistApplication.placeholderDescribe: Tell us about your talent, what kind of events you'd like to host, your style, and what makes you unique...
artistApplication.confirmAccuracy: I confirm that all the information provided is exact and complete. I understand that providing falsified or manipulated screenshots or follower counts will result in a permanent ban from Dreemystar, with no possibility of future applications.
artistApplication.acceptContact: I accept to be contacted by the Dreemystar team for further review of my application.
artistApplication.confirmDeclarations: Please confirm the declarations at the bottom of the form.
artistApplication.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
artistApplication.atLeastOneSocial: Please provide at least one social media profile link.
artistApplication.uploadImageFile: Please upload an image file (PNG, JPG, etc.).
artistApplication.submitFailed: Failed to submit application. Please try again.

obsStudio.virtualIntro: Compose your scene in OBS (overlays, screen share, multiple sources), then send the output to Dreemystar through the virtual camera. No separate streaming server is required.
obsStudio.step1: Build your scene in OBS (camera, screen capture, overlays, etc.).
obsStudio.step2: In OBS, click "Start Virtual Camera" (Controls, bottom-right).
obsStudio.step3: In this studio, click "Start Camera" or "Restart Camera".
obsStudio.step4: In the camera dropdown above, select "OBS Virtual Camera".
obsStudio.step5: Click "Go Live" — your OBS output goes to viewers.
obsStudio.tipMultitrack: Tip: In OBS → Settings → Stream, turn off "Enable Multitrack Video" to reduce warnings.
obsStudio.rtmpNote: RTMP needs infrastructure configured by the platform. If OBS shows "Starting the output failed", use the virtual camera method instead.
obsStudio.privacyNote: Keep your stream key private. Anyone with it can stream to this event channel.
